name: media-triage
description: Local media triage tool — sort your library without moving anything

scripts.dev:bg: nohup npm run dev > triage.log 2>&1 & echo $! > triage.pid && echo 'Started in background. Logs: triage.log'
scripts.stop: kill $(cat triage.pid 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null && rm -f triage.pid && echo 'Stopped' || echo 'Not running'
